verses.text: Tua ciangin Agrippa in Paul kiangah, “Tu-in thugen theihna ding hun na nei hi,” ci-in a gen ciangin Paul in a khut zanin a kiphelna ding thu hong gen a
“Kumpi Agrippa aw, Jew mite in kei hong mawhsakna thu ka kiphelna dingin nangma mai-ah tuni-in hun ngah ka hih manin hampha ka kisa mahmah hi

Nangmah in Jew mite' nuntakzia leh amau' thu kituh theihna thute khempeuh limtakin na theih khitsa ahih manin hampha ka kisa diak hi. Tua ahih manin lungduai takin ka thugente nong ngaihna dingin ka hong thum hi
“Jew mite khempeuh in ka neutunga kipan, keima pian'na gam leh Jerusalem khua-a ka omzia khempeuh hong thei uh hi
Kote' biakna sungah a hahkat phadiak Farisi pawl a kicite sunga ka om cila kipanin ka nuntakzia khempeuh, a gennop nak uh leh hong genthei ding uh hi

Ko Israel minam sawmlenihte in Pasian' thuciam ngahding lametna tawh a sun a zanin Pasian ka biabia uh a, ka pu ka pate uh tungah Pasian in a thuciamna ngahding lamenin ka omna hangin hih lai-ah thusitna thuakin a ding ka hi hi. Kumpipa aw, hih thu ka lametna hangin Jew mite in kei hong mawhsak ahi uh hi
Bang hangin no Jew mite in Pasian in misite a thawhkik sakna thu um theilo na hi uh hiam
“Nazareth khuami Jesuh' min a siattheihna dingin langpangin nial ding hi, ci-in keimahmah in ka ngaihsun ngei hi

Tua mah bangin Jerusalem khuasungah ka sempah a, siampi liante tung panin thu ngahna tawh Pasian' mi tampi thong sungah ka khum hi. Tua mite a sihna dingun thu a kikhen ciangin zong a thukimpih pawl ka hi hi
Kikhopna inn khempeuhah amaute gim ka thuaksak zelzel a, a thu upnate uh ka khawlsak hi. Amaute tungah hehlua mahmah ka hih manin gamdang nangawnah pai-in thu umte ka bawlsia hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Paul in A Kikheelna Thu Gen

verses.text: “Hih thu hang mahin siampi liante tung panin thu ngahna lai tawh Damaskas khua-ah ka va pai hi
Tua hi a, kumpipa aw, Damaskas khua ka tun'ma sun laitakin kei leh ka tonpih mite' kiimah sun sangin a taangzaw khuavak khat vantung panin hong taangzaih hi

Ka vekpi-un leilakah ka puk uh a, tua laitakin kei kiangah Hebru pau tawh thu hong kigen a, ‘Saul, Saul aw, bang hangin kei hong bawlsia na hi hiam? Bawngtal in a hawlte' ciangzum peek leh na a sakzawk bangin kei' thu nong nial manin nang-a' dingin nazaw hi,’ hong ci hi
‘Topa aw, kua na hi hiam?’ ci-in ka dot ciangin Topa in, ‘Na hong bawlsiat Jesuh ka hi hi

Tu-in tho-in na khe-in ding in. Keima na a sem dingin a hong sawl dingin nang tungah a hong kilang ka hi hi. Tuni-a kei nong muhna thuteng leh nang tungah ka hong lah lai ding thu khempeuh, midangte tungah a gen ding na hi hi
Israel mite leh Gentail mite lakah nang kong sawl ding a, amaute in nang hong suksiat lohna dingun ka hong kem ding hi

Pasian' teel mite' omna muna amau omna ding mun sanah hong om theihna dingun keimah hong upna uh tawh a mawhna uh a kimaisak theihna dingin Satan' khutsung panin Pasian' khutsungah a heikhia ding leh khuamial panin khuavak lamah hei-in a mit uh khua a musak dingpa na hi hi,’ a hong ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jew mite leh Gentail mite tungah A Thuhilhna Paul in Gen

verses.text: “Tua bang hi a, kumpi Agrippa aw, ka maangmuhna sunga vantung pana hong paipa' thugen ka mang hi

Mite a mawhna uh panin kisikin Pasian kiang a zuatna ding uh leh a kisikna uh a kilatsakna dingun a gamtat ding uh a masa-in Damaskas khua-ah thu hilhin, a zomin Jerusalem khua-ah, tua ciangin Jew mite omna gam khempeuh leh Gentail mite lakah thu ka hilh hi
Hih bangin ka thuhilhna hangin biakinn sungah ka om laitakin Jew mite in hong manin thah hong sawm uh hi

Ahi zongin Pasian in tuni ciangdong hong huh ahih manin milian mineu, a kuamah peuh tungah thu a hilh ka hi hi. Keima thuhilhte pen kamsangte leh Moses in hong tung ding hi, ci-in a gen thute mah ahi hi
Tua thu in: Khrih pen sihna thuakin a hingkik masapa hi ding a, Jew mite leh Gentail mite tungah hotkhiatna khuavak thu a hong genpa hi ding hi, cihna thu ahi hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Agrippa in Thu a Upna ding Paul in Zolbawl

verses.text: Hih bangin amah kiphelna thu Paul in a gen ciangin Festas in, “Paul aw, mihai na hita hi. Na pil sinnateng in mihai hong suaksak ta hi,” ci-in nakpi takin a kiko hi
Ahi zongin Paul in, “Menzi Festas aw, mihai ka hi kei a, lungsim pilin thuman a gen ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawn' khit ciangin

“Kumpi Agrippa aw, hih thu khempeuh na theihsa ahih manin nangma mai-ah hangtakin thu ka gen ngam hi. Hih thu pen kuama theihlohna munsimthama thupiang hilo ahih manin, a vekpi-in theikhin dingin ka hong um hi
Kumpi Agrippa aw, kamsangte' thugente um hilo na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Agrippa in Paul kiangah, “Hih hun tomno sungin Khristian hong suaksakzo dingin kingaihsun na hi hiam?” a cih ciangin

Paul in, “Nangmah-a kipan tuni-a ka thugen a za mi khempeuh hun tomno sung ahi a, hunsau sungin ahi zongin, hih bangin sikkhau hong kikhihna simloh, keimah nong batkimna dingun Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpi Agrippa leh menzi Festas hong ding uh a, Bernis leh a tutpih midangte zong hong dingkhia uh hi
Amaute a paikhiat khit uh ciangin, “Hih mipa in thongkiatna ding ahi a, sihna ding ahi zongin a thuakna dingin bangmah omlo hi,” a kici uh hi
Tua ciangin Agrippa in Festas kiangah, “Gam uk kumpipa Sisar' tungah a zu na khan khin hi kei leh khah ding hi lel hi,” a ci hi.
